reasoning: Both models failed to analyze the PKGBUILD (critical build script) due to incorrect binary file detection, making safety assessment impossible. PKGBUILD analysis is essential for AUR package security.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD - core build script was incorrectly skipped as binary
false_negatives: Entire PKGBUILD analysis missed - could contain unsafe build/install commands, network access, or privilege escalation
learnings: Improve binary file detection heuristics to prevent false binary classification of text files like PKGBUILD
Prioritize PKGBUILD analysis as first critical step before other files
Implement fallback mechanisms when primary file analysis fails
